facebook.caption:
Tourists keep walking past this place. Locals keep filling every seat.

Bún Quậy Kiến-Xây on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is Phu Quoc's answer to seafood noodles done right. Bún Quậy is a regional dish you won't find on most resort menus. Springy rice noodles, fresh seafood, rich broth. 2,618 reviews from people who actually live here.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Slurping Bún Quậy at a packed local shop while tourists walk straight past. This is 71A Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and it has 2,618 reviews for a reason. Find it before the crowds do.

tiktok.caption: The noodle shop Phu Quoc locals actually eat at. No resort. No tourists. Just Bún Quậy. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel
